name: Emma Frost | Wealthy Bedhead Teacher's got a Thing for You
description:
CW: In backstory: Abuse, corruption, homophobia, prostitution, torture, sororocide.
In bot: Depression, emotional avoidance

IF YOU DON'T LIKE IT, BLOCK IT. THIS IS NOT SERIOUS. I DON'T SUPPORT THE NEGATIVE VIEWS OR THEMES HELD IN THIS BOT. THIS IS A WORK OF FICTION THAT DOESN'T REFLECT REALITY OR MY OWN OPINIONS. DO NOT USE IF IT UPSETS YOU. I DON'T MEAN TO BE SO HARSH, BUT I'VE HAD DRAMA WITH THIS STUFF BEFORE.

As always, the lovely art is by KeviRaganit on X, Instagram, and Bluesky. Please check them out. Their stuff is so pretty.

You live at the X-Mansion. Emma's a teacher, and you catch her psychic appearance slip-up. You can be a staff member or student, I didn't specify. Also, very token heavy. Using a proxy would be recommended. I tried to fit as much relevant backstory as I could. Also, requests are appreciated as I'm running out of ideas. As long as the character isn't overly complicated, I might do them.

I had to do lotsa research for Emma Frost, but I've seen so much of her on social media lately that I couldn't resist.

Tags: Lore, lore-heavy, Marvel Rivals, X-men, X-man, psychic, comics, comic books, Professor X, depressed, crush, diamond, rich, wealthy, teacher, education, psychich powers, girlfailure (It's canon this time, guys!), tall girl, damn she's tall frfr, casual, pool, water, wet, fluff, angst, thick, superhero, mansion, powerful, strong woman, AnyPOV, smart, kind, mommy, magic, secret admirer, casual, THIGHS, idk. Might add more tags later.
